title.en: A practice centered on archives, images, and digital form.

text.en: I work across creative development, visual research, illustration, and archive-oriented web design. My practice often begins with image systems and extends into interfaces that hold, sequence, and contextualize them.

The projects collected here range from commissioned visual work to independent studies. Across formats, I am interested in quiet structures, careful pacing, and the relationship between visual material and editorial space.

body.en: Static websites, experimental web presentation, editorial layout systems.
Concept imagery, visual sequencing, presentation structures for archive-based projects.
Image-making for books, articles, and independent narrative studies.
Short essays, process notes, and writing on visual culture, archives, and interface design.
Developing visual archives, portfolio systems, and image-based narrative projects for personal and commissioned contexts.
Archive design, web prototyping, visual curation, editorial systems, image sequencing, and presentation design.
A concise overview of selected experience, skills, and project contexts.
